constraints.name: estimate_templates_owner_id_consistency
constraints.expression:
(owner_kind = 'system' and owner_id is null)
      or (owner_kind = 'org' and owner_id is not null)
      or (owner_kind = 'profile' and owner_id is not null)
default_markup_bps is null or (default_markup_bps >= 0 and default_markup_bps <= 10000)
default_discount_bps is null or (default_discount_bps >= 0 and default_discount_bps <= 10000)

functions.name: list_estimate_templates
functions.returnType: table ( id uuid, owner_kind text, owner_label text, title text, description text, scope text, published_to_public boolean, cover_image_url text, stage_count integer, is_manageable boolean, updated_at timestamptz )

policies.name: template_stages_select
policies.using:
exists (
      select 1
      from public.estimate_templates et
      where et.id = template_stages.estimate_template_id
        and public.can_read_template(et.owner_kind, et.owner_id)
    )

policies.name: template_stages_insert
policies.withCheck:
exists (
      select 1
      from public.estimate_templates et
      where et.id = template_stages.estimate_template_id
        and public.can_manage_template(et.owner_kind, et.owner_id)
    )

policies.name: template_stages_update
policies.using:
exists (
      select 1
      from public.estimate_templates et
      where et.id = template_stages.estimate_template_id
        and public.can_manage_template(et.owner_kind, et.owner_id)
    )
policies.withCheck:
exists (
      select 1
      from public.estimate_templates et
      where et.id = template_stages.estimate_template_id

policies.name: template_stages_delete
policies.using:
exists (

policies.name: template_works_select
policies.using:
exists (
      select 1
      from public.template_stages ts
      join public.estimate_templates et on et.id = ts.estimate_template_id
      where ts.id = template_works.template_stage_id
        and public.can_read_template(et.owner_kind, et.owner_id)
    )

policies.name: template_resource_lines_select
policies.using:
exists (
      select 1
      from public.template_works tw
      join public.template_stages ts on ts.id = tw.template_stage_id
      join public.estimate_templates et on et.id = ts.estimate_template_id
      where tw.id = template_resource_lines.template_work_id
        and public.can_read_template(et.owner_kind, et.owner_id)
    )
